evals.prompt: Create a logo and tagline for Napolleon — a decision-making platform that uses pairwise comparison and distributed voting to help groups make better collective decisions. Vision: Make every group decision fair and clear. Mission: Replace chaotic debates with structured, transparent decision-making. Key features: pairwise comparison voting, real-time results via SSE, demographic breakdowns, confidence scores.
evals.expected_output: Brand brief (.md) with full team brainstorm, SVG and PNG logo, and tagline under 8 words
assertions: Brand brief contains sections from at least 5 team roles
Brand brief includes a tagline recommendation
Brand brief includes a color palette with hex values
Logo uses minimalist/negative space style by default

evals.prompt: Make me a logo for my Thai restaurant called 'Soi 9'. We serve street food style Thai cuisine in a modern fast-casual setting in Los Angeles. I want something that feels authentic but not cheesy.
evals.expected_output: Brand brief with cultural considerations from the regional advisor, SVG/PNG logo, and tagline
assertions: Output includes logo files (svg and png)
The @regional-cultural-advisor role provides input on Thai cultural elements
The logo avoids stereotypical Thai imagery clichés
The visual direction balances authenticity with modern appeal

evals.prompt: I need a logo for my company. It's called TrueNorth Analytics. We do B2B data analytics consulting for mid-market companies. Can you show me what logo styles you can do first?
evals.expected_output: First presents available logo styles from the reference, then proceeds with the workshop after user picks a style (or uses default)
assertions: Claude presents logo style options from references/logo-styles.md
Each style includes a brief description
Claude recommends a style based on the B2B analytics context
Claude waits for user input or proceeds with the recommended default
